LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SWINERTON BUILDERS' MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SWINERTON BUILDERS' MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED IN PART WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AND DENIED IN PART. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE IRRELEVANT ALLEGATIONS, ATTORNEYS' FEES, AND PREJUDGMENT INTEREST ALLEGATIONS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. (SEE WORD MINUTES OR ORDER SIGNED THIS DATE FOR THE COURT'S COMPLETE RULING.) ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

Swinerton Builders Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike To Plaintiffs Amended Complaint; Declaration Of Alana P. Zech, Esq.
Off Calendar May-18-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT SWINERTON BUILDERS' MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Defendant Swinerton Builders' motion to strike is granted in part with leave to amend and denied in part. Defendant's motion to strike irrelevant allegations, attorneys' fees, and prejudgment interest allegations is denied. Defendant's motion to strike punitive damages is granted with leave to amend.

(See Word minutes or order signed this date for the Court's complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-19-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT SWINERTON BUILDERS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Defendant Swinerton Builders' demurrer to the first amended complaint ("FAC") is sustained in part and overruled in part. Defendant's demurrer for failure to state a claim is sustained with leave to amend as to the sixth cause of action, and without leave to amend as to the seventh and eighth causes of action. Defendant's demurrer for failure to state a claim is overruled as to the first, second, third, fourth, and fifth causes of action. Defendant's demurrer for uncertainty is overruled in its entirety.

(See Word minutes or order signed this date for the Court's complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
